description_long: This is a modern bed with a rectangular, low-profile platform frame and a tall, tufted headboard. The headboard features a grid of subtle, evenly spaced buttons, giving it a plush, upholstered appearance. The mattress sits flush with the frame, and there are no visible legs or under-bed storage, resulting in a clean, minimalist silhouette. The entire bed, including the headboard and frame, is covered in a uniform, light gray fabric. The design is simple and contemporary, suitable for both residential and urban hospitality settings. The bed appears sturdy and comfortable, with a soft, inviting surface.
description: A modern, light gray platform bed with a tall, tufted headboard and a minimalist, upholstered frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, tufted headboard and the full width of the bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low-profile frame and the thickness of the mattress and headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headboard and the rectangular shape of the bed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same low-profile frame and headboard thickness as the other side.
